query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `bank_transfer_requests` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `requestedAmount` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `amount` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `currency` varchar(3) NOT NULL,
  `usdAmount` decimal(10,2),
  `exchangeRate` decimal(10,4),
  `receiptImageUrl` text NOT NULL,
  `referenceNumber` varchar(100),
  `ocrReferenceNumber` varchar(100),
  `ocrAmount` decimal(10,2),
  `ocrCurrency` varchar(3),
  `ocrDate` datetime,
  `ocrConfidence` decimal(3,2),
  `status` enum('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `submittedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `approvedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `approvedBy` int,
  `adminNotes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_reference` (`referenceNumber`),
  KEY `idx_user` (`userId`),
  KEY `idx_status` (`status`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
